## The Ask

**Who is this for?** [Name the specific user or role — not "users"]

**What problem does it solve?** [What breaks or stays hard without this?]

**Why now?** [Why is this the most valuable thing next?]

---

## Acceptance Criteria

[What does done look like? Be specific enough for Vera to test against.]

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

---

## Definition of Ready Checklist

Before Superman briefs the squad:

- [ ] Right user named
- [ ] Right problem defined
- [ ] Why now answered
- [ ] Squad mode assigned: [ Solo / Squad / Full ]
- [ ] Bob's blueprint needed: [ Yes / No ]
- [ ] Marlo's UX spec needed: [ Yes / No ]
- [ ] Kryptonite red team needed: [ Yes (Squad/Full) / No (Solo) ]
- [ ] Economics cleared by G: [ Yes / Not needed ]

---

## Size Estimate

[ S — hours / M — day / L — 2-3 days / XL — week+ ]

---

## Notes

[Anything else the squad should know. Technical constraints, dependencies, Steve's strong preferences.]
